tables.name: doctors
tables.comments: Provider profile. The main doctor is the row referenced by runtime.tenant_profile.doctor_id.

tables.name: staff_members
tables.comments: Doctor team seat. doctor_id points to the provider this staff member supports.

tables.name: predoctors
tables.comments: Assistant/pre-doctor supervised by a doctor for prechecks and preparation.

tables.name: doctor_specialties
tables.comments: Join table between doctors and specialties.

tables.name: secretary_slots
tables.comments: Bookable slot created from schedule or staff.

tables.name: tenant_profile
tables.comments: Tenant owner profile. doctor_id identifies the main doctor this app belongs to.

tables.name: tenant_app_config
tables.comments: Runtime app branding and behavior config.

notes.content: Read: FK > owner. Areas group schemas. Lines should flow left to right.

main doctor = runtime.tenant_profile.doctor_id -> identity.doctors.id. Team = staff_members.doctor_id and predoctors.supervisor_id -> that doctor. Schedule, clinic, branding, and contracts attach to the same provider.
